title: Implement n-many rounds in congress workflow

log.context: Implement n-many rounds in congress workflow

Done. Here's what was changed:

**`/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/congress_act.py`**

Added new `congress_check_continue` activity (~47 lines). It:
- Builds a debate summary from all rounds so far
- Prompts Ibrahim with exponential-decay framing: "this is round N of MAX_ROUNDS, only continue for SIGNIFICANT unresolved disagreement, default DONE by round 3+"
- Parses `[CONTINUE]` / `[DONE]` from the response; defaults to `False` if ambiguous
- Returns a bool
